game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
{
  "concept": "Classic side-scrolling platformer focused on precise jump timing, hazard navigation, and collectible-driven routing. Core verbs: run, short/long press jumps to clear gaps, land on/avoid monsters, grab coins/gold, and manage limited health that can be extended mid-run by finding cloverleaf pickups. This spec frames play as score-chasing stages: each level is a compact obstacle course with moving platforms, pits, and simple enemy patterns where faster clears, clean runs, and full collection raise rank. Tournament/leaderboard support is treated as dedicated score modes layered on top of the main worlds.",
  "name": "Lep's World - Jump n Run Games",
  "developer": "nerByte GmbH",
  "genre": "Platformer / Run-and-Jump",
  "price": "Free (Offers In-App Purchases)",
  "rating": "4.7/5 (24.9K ratings)",
  "rank": "#80 in Action",
  "source_url": "https://apps.apple.com/in/app/leps-world-jump-n-run-games/id486717857",
  "level_structure": "6 themed worlds totaling 160 handcrafted stages. Worlds introduce tougher enemy mixes and trickier jump setups. Within each world, complete any 10 stages at rank ≥A to unlock the final challenge stage for that world; clearing it unlocks the next world. Optional ‘Tournament’ playlist rotates weekly hand-picked stages tuned for score competition.",
  "scoring_model": {
    "base_clear": 1000,
    "time_bonus": "Up to +400 based on % under par (linear).",
    "coin_bonus": "+1 per coin/gold collected; +100 for 100% collection.",
    "streak_bonus": "+10 per consecutive monster avoided/defeated without taking damage (cap +200).",
    "hit_penalty": "-50 per hit taken.",
    "life_bonus": "+100 per unused life at clear.",
    "no_hit_bonus": "+300 for finishing with no damage.",
    "ranks": { "S": "≥2200", "A": "≥1700", "B": "≥1300", "C": "<1300" }
  },
  "keyboard_inputs": {
    "Move Left/Right": "Left/Right or A/D",
    "Jump": "Space (hold for higher leap)",
    "Sprint": "Shift",
    "Pause/Menu": "Esc",
    "Restart Stage": "R",
    "Next/Continue": "Enter"
  },
  "assumptions": [
    "Exact gating (A-rank requirement) and rank thresholds are added for this spec to formalize score play; the store page lists many levels and leaderboards but not a specific scoring rubric.",
    "Tournament is modeled as a rotating score playlist to align with the page’s mention of a tournament mode and leaderboards.",
    "Sprint and stomp-to-defeat behaviors are common to this genre but not explicitly stated on the page; treated as reasonable assumptions.",
    "Keyboard bindings are chosen to satisfy the keyboard-only constraint (original game is touch-based)."
  ]
}
game_info.description: Navigate through challenging platformer stages as a brave leprechaun! Jump across gaps, avoid enemies, and collect coins and gold to maximize your score. Manage your health carefully and look for cloverleaf pickups to extend your lives. Complete stages quickly and without taking damage to earn higher ranks (S, A, B, C). Unlock new worlds by achieving A-rank or better on at least 10 stages in each world. Master precise jump timing and smart routing to become a platforming champion!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys / A,D: Move Left/Right
Space: Jump (hold for higher jump)
Shift: Sprint (run faster)
Enter: Start Game / Continue
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and navigation test. Validates that the player can move left/right, jump over gaps, and reach the end of a simple stage without dying. Tests fundamental platforming mechanics.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move right continuously while jumping over gaps and avoiding enemies. Use basic collision detection to time jumps. Don't optimize for score, just reach the goal flag safely.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully reaches the goal flag at the end of stage 1 without falling into pits. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Test is successful if win condition is achieved within reasonable time.

TEST_2.test_description: Optimal score-chasing strategy. Tests coin collection, enemy avoidance, time optimization, and no-hit bonus achievement. Validates the full scoring system and rank calculation.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Sprint through the stage while collecting all coins and gold. Jump precisely to avoid all enemies and maintain a perfect streak. Optimize path to finish under par time. Aim for S-rank by maximizing all bonus categories.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player achieves S-rank (≥2200 points) by collecting all coins, avoiding all damage, finishing quickly, and earning all available bonuses. Game shows S-rank on completion screen.

TEST_3.test_description: Health and cloverleaf pickup mechanics. Tests that taking damage reduces health correctly and that cloverleaf pickups restore health properly. Validates survival mechanics.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Intentionally take damage from enemies early in the stage, then collect cloverleaf pickups to restore health. Continue to complete the stage with recovered health.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Health decreases when hit by enemies, increases when collecting cloverleaves, and player can complete stage with restored health. Health UI updates correctly throughout.
